meaning: n.沙玛什(巴比伦和亚述神话中的太阳神,象征正义) n.=shamas
examples: Mr. DANIEL SHAMASH: (Through translator) Before now there were all Christians, no Muslims at all.
In court, Mr Shamash said there was "nothing that comes close" to a proper consultation and that there were "real concerns" over the impact of the plans, especially on the vulnerable.
The man giving mass now is Daniel Shamash(ph).
